nameEn: No entry for traffic in both directions
actionEn: Travel on this road is completely prohibited — do not enter, choose another route.
Entry in this direction is prohibited (e.g., the opposite side of a one-way road) — do not enter.

nameEn: No entry for motor vehicles except single-track motorcycles
actionEn: Only single-track motorcycles are allowed — all other motor vehicles are prohibited from entering.
Buses are prohibited from entering this road.
Motorcycles are prohibited from entering this road.
Trucks above the stated weight are prohibited from entering.

nameEn: No entry for tractors and slow-moving vehicles
actionEn: Tractors and slow-moving vehicles are prohibited from entering.

nameEn: No entry for vehicles with trailers
actionEn: Vehicles towing a trailer are prohibited from entering.
Horse-drawn carts are prohibited from entering.
Cyclists are prohibited from entering this road or path.
Mopeds are prohibited from entering.
Cycle rickshaws are prohibited from entering.
Handcarts are prohibited from entering.

nameEn: No entry for vehicles carrying explosive/flammable goods
actionEn: Vehicles carrying explosive or flammable substances are prohibited from entering.

nameEn: No entry for vehicles carrying dangerous goods
actionEn: Vehicles carrying dangerous goods (ADR) are prohibited from entering.

nameEn: No entry for vehicles that may pollute water
actionEn: Vehicles that could pollute water are prohibited from entering (e.g., near a body of water).
Vehicles wider than the stated value are prohibited from entering.
Vehicles taller than the stated value are prohibited from passing (under a bridge/tunnel).
Vehicles longer than the stated value (with a trailer) are prohibited from entering.
Vehicles heavier than the stated total weight are prohibited from entering.
If the load on a single axle exceeds the stated value, entry is prohibited (bridge restriction).
Come to a full stop, yield to traffic on the crossing road, proceed only when it's safe.
Turning left at this intersection is prohibited.
Turning right at this intersection is prohibited.
A U-turn is prohibited at this point.
The U-turn prohibition ends here.
Overtaking other vehicles is prohibited on this section.
Overtaking is prohibited for trucks (allowed for passenger cars).
The overtaking prohibition ends here.

nameEn: End of no-overtaking zone for trucks
actionEn: The overtaking prohibition for trucks ends here.
Sounding the horn is prohibited in this area (usually within a built-up area).
The horn prohibition ends here.
A narrow section — yield to oncoming traffic, stop and wait if necessary.
Come to a full stop before customs control.
A border control checkpoint — stop and follow instructions.
The barrier is not working — stop and ensure your own safety.
The light signal is not working — proceed with extra caution.
A ferry boarding point — follow the queue and instructions, stop.
A police checkpoint — stop, have your documents ready.
A toll collection point (motorway) — stop and pay.
Exceeding the stated speed is prohibited — observe the limit.
The speed limit ends here (general rules apply).
Parking is prohibited here — a brief stop may be allowed.
Parking is prohibited during the stated hours, allowed at other times.

nameEn: No parking longer than stated time
actionEn: Do not leave the vehicle longer than the stated number of minutes.

nameEn: Limited parking time during stated hours
actionEn: Parking time is limited during the stated hours — observe the limit.
Even a brief stop is prohibited here.
Parking is prohibited on odd-numbered days of the month.
Parking is prohibited on even-numbered days of the month.
Start of the zone — parking inside is restricted per the plate.
The restricted parking zone ends here.
Pedestrians are prohibited from entering this area.
All prohibitions and restrictions in effect until this point end here.
Start of the zone — the stated speed limit applies throughout the zone.
The speed limit zone ends here.
